name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Pokémon Battle RPG — How to Play

• Tap /start to open the main menu
• 📖 Pokédex — Browse all Pokémon species
• ⚔️ Challenge Gym — Battle gym leaders for XP & rewards
• 👥 Manage Team — Check your Pokémon, heal, rename
• 🎯 Issue Duel — Challenge another trainer
• ✅ Accept Duel — Accept a pending challenge

Everything is button-driven — just tap!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
